subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who was named Muhammad-before-Taqi, that he may rejoice in this remembrance whereby all things have proclaimed: "The Kingdom is God's!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من سمی بمحمد قبل تقی لیفرح بهذا الذکر الذی به نطقت الاشیاء الملک لله
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @suffering and imprisonment
